title: Follow-ups in activities board
excerpt: In the activities board, you can create a follow-up with a date and add a reminder.  I have added an automation to create a new item in the activities board to add the follow-up, but the item name just appears as ‘follow…

posts.author: julie.swanzy (Julie Swanzy)
posts.cookedHtml: In the activities board, you can create a follow-up with a date and add a reminder. I have added an automation to create a new item in the activities board to add the follow-up, but the item name just appears as ‘follow-up’ and isn’t linked to the original meeting. Is there a better way of adding follow-up actions so the team can easily see what items they need to be following up on each day/week?
